subject: FW: Gabrielle Guttman
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Sheridan Gibson [mailto:sheridan@sheridanenterprises.com] 
Sent: Friday, November 09, 2007 12:30 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Gabrielle Guttman



Hi there Lesley!  

How are you?  I know it's Friday and I've missed Jeffrey, but I wanted
to get this information to him about this terrific girl named Gabrielle
Guttman that I met while in Miami.  She works with a merchant banking
platform, Southridge as the Vice President of Business Development &
Marketing.  She is responsible for investor relations for the Southridge
funds.  They are based in Manhatten & Connecticut and she is marketing
Southridge financing products for global public issuers.  She graduated
Magna Cum Laude with a Bachelor of Arts in Economics from Barnard
College, Columbia University... super smart and attractive!  I know
Jeffrey will like her!  Gabrielle is looking to raise capital for the
following:

1)     3 funds.  2 are hedge funds (private placement and quant
strategy) and the other is a real estate fund.

2)     She is launching a Private Equity Fund in Q1 2008.  Here are some
bullet points on this Fund:

	*	Will be run by an experienced management team. They are
working with Don Jones, http://poganretail.com/donjones.html
<http://poganretail.com/donjones.html>  
	*	Focused on capitalizing on opportunities with neglected
consumer brands and distressed retail companies 
	*	Anchor Investment:  Petals Decorative Accents 

Attached is a resume on Gabrielle and some information on Southridge's
group of companies.  I will have Gabrielle contact you directly to see
if she can set up an appointment to visit with Jeffrey.  Thanks a bunch!

Hope you are well.

Best regards,

Sheridan

 

Hope all is well

body_html:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

From: Sheridan Gibson [mailto:sheridan@sheridanenterprises.com]
Sent: Friday, November 09, 2007 12:30 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Gabrielle Guttman

Hi there Lesley! 

How are you?  I know it’s Friday and I’ve missed Jeffrey, but I wanted to get this information to him about this terrific girl named Gabrielle Guttman that I met while in Miami.  She works with a merchant banking platform, Southridge as the Vice President of Business Development & Marketing.  She is responsible for investor relations for the Southridge funds.  They are based in Manhatten & Connecticut and she is marketing Southridge financing products for global public issuers.  She graduated Magna Cum Laude with a Bachelor of Arts in Economics from Barnard College, Columbia University… super smart and attractive!  I know Jeffrey will like her!  Gabrielle is looking to raise capital for the following:

1)     3 funds.  2 are hedge funds (private placement and quant strategy) and the other is a real estate fund.

2)     She is launching a Private Equity Fund in Q1 2008.  Here are some bullet points on this Fund:

    • Will be run by an experienced management team. They are working with Don Jones, http://poganretail.com/donjones.html
    • Focused on capitalizing on opportunities with neglected consumer brands and distressed retail companies
    • Anchor Investment:  Petals Decorative Accents

Attached is a resume on Gabrielle and some information on Southridge’s group of companies.  I will have Gabrielle contact you directly to see if she can set up an appointment to visit with Jeffrey.  Thanks a bunch!

Hope you are well.

Best regards,

Sheridan

 

Hope all is well
